name: ystacks
description: Yesterday's PUBLIC plugin catalog for Claude Code -- generic-tauglich plugins (no Yesterday-infra deps).

plugins.name: yastack
plugins.description: Agent core -- generic skills for AI agents in human-AI collaboration and AI-as-expert workflows (Levels of AGI 3-4). Public, no Yesterday-infra deps.

plugins.name: yopstack
plugins.description: Ops core -- generic infrastructure-provisioning, deployment, and observability skills. Public, no Yesterday-infra deps.

plugins.name: ydstack
plugins.description: Daily-work stack -- generic productivity, creative, and knowledge skills for humans (excalidraw, PARA memory, web/x scrapers, slack, miro, figma, voxtral, niche verticals). Skills do NOT need .ytstack/ project state.
